title: Annual deaths attributable to antibiotic-resistant bacteria (millions)

source.name: Lancet 2022 Global AMR Study; UN Ad Hoc Interagency Coordinating Group 2019

notes: Illustrative. 2019 figure (1.27M) is from the Lancet study as directly attributable deaths; ~700K pre-2019 estimates from O'Neill Review. 2050 projection (10M) is from the 2016 Review on AMR.
